summary: W1416 adds a checked closed-map endpoint-kernel/cokernel-top-data stable convergence guard tying W974 through W973 into the closed-map route chain. The original four-task product goal remains open.
known_gaps: ProductSuccessDeclarations only checks the bounded-derived name without an original-four-task completion witness.
OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations lacks the original-four-task completion witness.
Required negative fixtures remain incomplete for several premature-success patterns.
External final readonly audit is expected to fail until terminal_outcome.outcome is product_success.
remaining_work: Advance the remaining Lean route blockers after W1416, including downstream W975+ field splits, packet blockers, and any completion-contract blockers still recorded by the audits.
